purpose: Detailed machine-readable snapshot of the single current executable session. This complements SESSION_STATE.json rather than replacing it.

currentSession.title: Write provenance + review logs per request
currentSession.objective: Persist request ID, seed, output path, backend, and review state in a machine-readable per-request provenance log alongside each generated batch output.
currentSession.whyItMatters: Without per-request provenance, regeneration decisions and review continuity rely on batch_manifest.json summaries only. A per-request log makes each asset independently traceable and supports future review/approval workflows.

conditionalModify.condition: only if a small normalization or dataclass hook is required for provenance writing

minimum: one deterministic /tmp smoke run confirming per-request provenance files are written alongside generated audio
additionalWhenApplicable: verify provenance JSON files contain request_id, seed, output_path, backend, review_status, generated_at
verify provenance files are written for both music and SFX committed fixtures

doneCriteriaSummary: Every request in a batch produces a machine-readable provenance record alongside its output file.
Provenance records include at minimum: request_id, seed, output_path, backend, review_status, generated_at.
Tests verify provenance file existence and required fields for the committed SFX fixture.
Existing batch generation behavior (file output, batch_manifest.json) is preserved.
Docs describe the provenance behavior truthfully without overstating format stability.

nextSession.title: Add batch QA gate command for generated outputs

fixturePolicy: Use the committed example artifacts under docs/AI_FACTORY/EXAMPLES/gamerewritten_vertical_slice/ as the default fixtures.
Do not invent alternate schema examples unless the committed artifacts are insufficient and the missing case is added explicitly.
